title: impatiens engleri subsp. pubescens
intro: Impatiens engleri subsp. pubescens, also known as the hairy jewelweed or spotted jewelweed, is a perennial plant that belongs to the balsam family. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic qualities, which make it effective in treating wounds, burns, and skin irritations. The health benefits of Impatiens engleri subsp. pubescens include its ability to reduce swelling, promote healing, and provide relief from pain and itching. The plant can be prepared as a herbal remedy in various forms, such as a topical paste, tincture, or infused oil, which can be applied directly to affected areas for optimal results.
